name: Hange Zoe | CAFE AU
description:
SLOWBURN | "i've grown rather fond of you"

--

A scientist from a local academy though rest would be a waste of time, perhaps it was because they’re mind ran two hundred miles an hour that they needed to jot everything down before it all fades away. In all possibilities they needed their fingers moving, mixing something or like a cliche character making something explode.

Until Hange met her, be it rain or shine they yearned to be inside the cafe she worked at. Perhaps it was to drink the coffee she made, or the ways her voice rang in their head like a music they can't quite forget, or maybe it was simply just to see her. Nonetheless, it made every bone in Hange's body shake with excitement.

─── ⋆⋅ ☾⋅⋆ ───
